creator: jszhao@yeah.net
text:
When I tried to install lang/gnat-aux using:

make install clean

I got the following error message:

===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib/gcc
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===>   Registering installation for gnat-aux-20120301_1
Installing gnat-aux-20120301_1...pkg: gnat-aux-20120301_1 conflicts with binutils-2.22_3 (installs files into the same place).
Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/libiberty.a
*** Error code 70

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/gnat-aux.

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/lang/gnat-aux
# make install clean
